Rows: COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN T1.ID ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.ID)

gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(CASE WHEN T1.Diagnosis LIKE '%SLE%' THEN T1.ID ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(T1.ID) FROM Patient AS T1 INNER JOIN Laboratory AS T2 ON T1.ID = T2.ID WHERE T2.`GOT` >= 60
